response.overview: Teo and Karina have been the best of friends for as long as they can remember - and the only thing stronger than their friendship is their shared dream of becoming doctors. But after receiving interview offers to UBC’s MD program and being whisked away to a strange and exciting universe, they find their friendship tested against the pressures of the admissions process and the forces of evil that seek to tear their connection apart. Will our brave heroes get into medical school? Or will their friendship break apart trying?
response.tagline: The true meaning of medical school
response.title: UBC Medicine: For Good
